mapper.select: SELECT id, note_id, markdown_content, markdown_content_new, create_time, update_time FROM biz_note_context WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_note_context (note_id, markdown_content, markdown_content_new, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{noteId}, #{markdownContent}, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_note_context SET markdown_content = #{markdownContent}, markdown_content_new = #{markdownContentNew}, update_time = NOW() WHERE note_id = #{noteId}
